Article Title: India semi-finals qualification scenario: What India must do to stay alive at T20 World Cup
Article Text:
India cricketers during a practice session. (Pic credit: BCCI)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

India's Playing XI: A big headache for Gautam Gambhir, Suryakumar Yadav

Must-win situation with NRR pressure

What India must do now

NEW DELHI: The real T20 World Cup has begun for co-hosts and defending champions India, and suddenly, nothing is in their control anymore. A crushing 76-run defeat to South Africa at Narendra Modi stadium in Ahmedabad has pushed the pre-tournament favourites into a virtual knockout phase, starting with their must-win Super 8 clash against Zimbabwe in Chennai on Thursday.The heavy loss, combined with West Indies’ massive 107-run win over Zimbabwe, has severely dented India’s semi-final hopes. More worrying than the defeat itself is the net run rate (NRR) damage. India’s NRR has plummeted to -3.800, leaving them far behind West Indies (+5.350) and South Africa (+3.800) in Group 1.With only two matches remaining, Suryakumar Yadav’s side not only need to win but win big — and hope other results go their way.India’s path is straightforward on paper but complicated in reality. They must beat both Zimbabwe and West Indies to reach four points. However, even two wins may not guarantee qualification if net run rate becomes the deciding factor in a three-way tie.If South Africa defeat West Indies and Zimbabwe, both South Africa and India will qualify. But if South Africa lose one match, and three teams finish level on four points, NRR will determine the semifinalists — an area where India currently trail badly.This makes India’s margin of victory crucial. A narrow win over Zimbabwe will not be enough; they need emphatic victories to repair the damage.The immediate focus will be on Zimbabwe in Chennai. A dominant win — potentially by 80-100 runs or more — could significantly improve India’s NRR and revive their chances.Their final Super 8 clash against West Indies in Kolkata on March 1 could then become a virtual quarterfinal.However, India’s fate will also depend on the South Africa-West Indies result. While those permutations remain out of their hands, India’s task is clear.For the defending champions, survival now depends not just on winning — but on winning big.
Article Summary: Defending champions India have been knocked out of the T20 World Cup by South Africa. India's net run rate (NRR) has plummeted to -3.800, leaving them far behind West Indies and South Africa in Group 1. Suryakumar Yadav’s side not only need to win but win big — and hope other results go their way.

Article Title: Sri Lanka search for answers as downward spiral continues
Article Text:
Dasun Shanaka of Sri Lanka drops a catch (Getty Images)

India keep T20 World Cup dream alive, over to Kolkata now

“I’m sorry,” Sri Lanka captain Dasun Shanaka said, his voice low but firm. “We didn’t give our fans what they deserved.”Under the glare of the Khettarama floodlights, Sri Lanka’s T20 World Cup dreams had just flickered out. A soul-crushing 61-run loss to New Zealand sealed their exit from this showpiece tournament. As Shanaka spoke at the post-match presentation ceremony, the packed stands at R Premadasa Stadium watched in stunned silence. From the sea-salted ramparts of Galle to the sleepless high-rises of Colombo and the sun-burned coast of Mirissa, a nation had gone into mourning.While offering his apology to fans for the team’s “embarrassing” performance, Shanaka oddly appealed to the Sri Lankan government to step in and stop the atmosphere of negativity surrounding the team. “There was too much negativity around this team,” he said. “You can try to stay positive inside the dressing room but outside, the noise never stops.“Most of the time we mainly hear negative stuff. There is a negative environment created from the outside. That’s a disadvantage for cricket in Sri Lanka. At least for the players coming up next, if the government could interfere and stop those (public criticism), I believe that will be a great help for our better mental health,” he added in an unprecedented request.Shanaka spoke of the microphones clustered beyond the gates, of commentary from those, in his words, “had not even watched the game”.In a country where passions run deep, criticism over Sri Lanka’s lacklustre performances have turned into a raging storm. Results were unkind long before the tournament. Since mid-last year, Sri Lanka’s limited-overs form had meandered into no-man’s land. By the time the T20 World Cup arrived, confidence was already fragile.Shanaka admitted he and the team management misread the Khettarama surface, expecting truer batting tracks. Instead, spin gripped early and decisively. Six wickets fell to New Zealand’s slower bowlers as Sri Lanka crawled to 107/8. “Our best batters are here,” he insisted. “No one is here by force. But sometimes you don’t get the conditions you expect.”The Sri Lankan captain’s comments did little to mask his batters’ glaring incompetence. Against New Zealand, Sri Lanka’s batters showed little intent and no clear blueprint. At times, there was a streak of recklessness which only hastened the slide. They struggled to pierce the field, failed to rotate strike and allowed pressure to stifle them. It seemed the innings was stuck in first gear.Injuries have compounded the slide. Wily spinner Wanindu Hasaranga tore a hamstring in the opening match. Pacer Matheesha Pathirana strained a calf days later. Eshan Malinga had been ruled out before the first ball was bowled. “Fitness must be non-negotiable,” Shanaka said, acknowledging a deeper, recurring fault line.Former captain Kumar Sangakkara said Sri Lanka were in danger of becoming irrelevant in the cricket world. “There is a lot of work to be done at all levels to course correct,” he wrote on X. “We can’t do the same things over and over and expect different results when the cricket world around us has evolved so quickly. We haven’t adapted and the danger is irrelevance.”On Wednesday, Sri Lanka lost more than just a match. They lost momentum, belief and perhaps a measure of faith between the team and public.
Article Summary: Sri Lanka's T20 World Cup dreams have flickered out. A soul-crushing 61-run loss to New Zealand sealed their exit. Sri Lanka captain Dasun Shanaka appealed to the Sri Lankan government to step in and stop the atmosphere of negativity surrounding the team.

Article Title: Peerless South Africa storm into T20 World Cup semifinal
Article Text:
South Africa's captain Aiden Markram (AP Photo)

T20 World Cup: Sri Lanka bow out of the tournament; Pakistan’s hopes dim

AHMEDABAD: Even before India took the field against Zimbabwe in Chennai on Thursday evening, South Africa had done their bit to calm the nerves of Indian fans in the afternoon. South African captain Aiden Markram produced an exhibition of sublime ball-striking with an unbeaten 82 off 46 balls to take his team to a nine-wicket win after pacers Kagiso Rabada, Lungi Ngidi and Corbin Bosch ensured West Indies could only post 176/8 on a flat track.Chasing down the target in 16.1 overs not only sealed South Africa’s spot in the semifinal, it also brought down West Indies’ net run rate to 1.791. The result must have taken the pressure off the Indian team, which suffered a humiliating loss against South Africa last Sunday.In pursuit of 177, Markram laid down the marker in the Powerplay by racing to 43 off 20 balls. Quinton de Kock joined the party by smashing pacer Shamar Joseph for 16 runs in the final over of the Powerplay as South Africa scored 69 in six overs. De Kock fell to Roston Chase for 47 off 24 in the eighth over but then the scoreboard read 96/1. Ryan Rickelton joined Markram to score unbeaten 45 off 28 balls and finish the job.Earlier, the West Indies threatened to take off in the first two overs of the match, putting up 29 runs on the board.But Rabada and Ngidi pulled things back, reducing West Indies to 52/4. Rabada’s 2/22, Ngidi’s 3/30 and Bosch’s 2/31 had West Indies in dire straits at 83/7 by the 11th over.Jason Holder and Romario Shepherd played the rescue act with an 89-run partnership in 9.3 overs.Shepherd, coming out to bat at No. 9, finished unbeaten on 52 off 37 while Holder was run out in the final over for 49 off 31 balls. Rabada hurt West Indies’ chances by dismissing captain Shai Hope for 16 and Shimron Hetmyer for two in the third over. Ngidi then sent back Brandon King and Chase. On a day when Marco Jansen (0/50) and left-arm spinner Keshav Maharaj (0/43) were off-colour, Ngidi’s dipping slower balls and Bosch’s pinpoint yorkers meant West Indies managed only 13 runs in the last two overs.
Article Summary: South Africa beat West Indies by nine wickets. Kagiso Rabada, Lungi Ngidi and Corbin Bosch took three wickets each. Aiden Markram scored 82 off 46 balls for South Africa. West Indies could only post 176/8 on a flat track.

Article Title: Spanish prosecutors take action over racist abuse of Mbappe
Article Text:
Kylian Mbappe (Getty Images)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

Spanish public prosecutors want a man to be sent to jail for one year and pay a fine of €2,880 ($3,400).The man is accused of making monkey gestures after Real Madrid striker Kylian Mbappé scored a goal in a match last year.This was the first racist incident against the French star since he joined Real Madrid in 2024. However, racist abuse is still common in La Liga.Prosecutors said the accused, "acting with evident contempt for the player’s skin colour," shouted and made "denigrating gestures" targeting Mbappe during a match against Real Oviedo in August.The gestures, including "simulating primate movements and sounds," were clearly audible to spectators, prosecutors said in a statement.Mbappé’s Brazilian teammate, Vinícius Junior, has often faced racist abuse since joining the club in 2018. He is now involved in another controversy.Vinícius says that Benfica player Gianluca Prestianni racially abused him during a Champions League match this month, but the Argentine player has denied the accusation. In January, Albacete fans were also reported to have chanted racist songs against Vinícius.In May 2025, five Valladolid supporters were sent to prison for one year because of racist insults directed at Vinícius in 2022.Also, four members of an Atlético Madrid ultra group were given prison sentences for hanging a dummy of Vinícius in January 2023. However, their prison punishment was later changed to fines.
Article Summary: Spanish public prosecutors want a man to be sent to jail for one year and pay a fine of €2,880 ($3,400) The man is accused of making monkey gestures after Real Madrid striker Kylian Mbappé scored a goal in a match last year. This was the first racist incident against the French star since he joined Real Madrid in 2024.

Article Title: Arsenal face big test, Man City keep fighting, Spurs in trouble
Article Text:
Arsenal (Getty Images)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

Arsenal improved after players' meeting

Manchester City say they will not give up

Tottenham fighting to avoid relegation

Premier League leaders Arsenal will face their London rivals Chelsea on Sunday in an important match for the title race.Manchester City can stay close to Arsenal if they beat Leeds United. Meanwhile, Tottenham are struggling and cannot afford to lose again.Arsenal improved their performance after the players held a meeting before their big 4–1 win against Tottenham.Viktor Gyokeres and Eberechi Eze both scored twice in a north London derby rout that came just four days after Arsenal were stunned by a 2-2 draw at bottom of the table Wolves.Arsenal midfielder Declan Rice said the players spoke to each other in a "firm" way, leading to a cathartic victory at Tottenham that reestablished an five-point lead over second-placed Manchester City.After beating Tottenham, Arsenal are now five points ahead of second-placed Manchester City."It's important sometimes just to say what you feel and to let it all out in the group," Gyokeres said ahead of Chelsea's visit to the Emirates Stadium."Most of us spoke. Everyone can recognise how different people feel in the moment and you get a better understanding of the feeling."If you're not honest, I think it's hard to improve. It was a good chat and now we're going to prepare for a big game against Chelsea."City manager Pep Guardiola said his team will “never give up” in the fight for the Premier League title.Manchester City recently won 2–1 against Newcastle. Arsenal are five points ahead, but City have one extra match to play.If City win all their remaining 11 games, they will win the title no matter what Arsenal do."When I was at Spurs and we drew 2-2 someone said why don't we drop the Premier League and focus on the cups. I said, 'No, why? Let's go, let's try'," Guardiola said before City's trip to Leeds on Saturday."Many things are going to happen. Never give up. Ten or 11 games is a lot of games in the Premier League."Tottenham are in serious trouble and are only four points above the relegation zone.Their new interim manager Igor Tudor lost his first match 4–1 against Arsenal. Tottenham have not won in nine games and have many injured players.They have 11 matches left to avoid being relegated to the Championship."Of course there is enough time (to survive)," Tudor said."Stay humble, that is the key for each of us. Try to become what I said before: a hard-working team. That is the only goal we have now in this moment."
Article Summary: Arsenal beat Tottenham 4–1 in north London derby. Gunners now five points ahead of second-placed Manchester City. Manchester City can stay close to Arsenal if they beat Leeds United. Tottenham have not won in nine games and have many injured players.

Article Title: FIFA World Cup: Infantino has 'complete confidence’ in Mexico hosting tournament amid cartel violence
Article Text:
FIFA president Gianni Infantino during a press conference. (Reuters Photo)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

The violence in Mexico following the death of a powerful drug lord has raised concerns about whether the country can safely co-host the World Cup in just over three months. FIFA President Gianni Infantino, however, believes it is possible."Of course, we are monitoring the situation in Mexico these days, but I want to say from the outset that we have complete confidence in Mexico, in its president, Claudia Sheinbaum, and in the authorities, and we are convinced that everything will go as smoothly as possible," Infantino said late on Tuesday in a press conference in Colombia."Mexico is a great country, like in every country in the world, things happen; we don't live on the moon or another planet," Infantino added."That's why we have governments, police, and authorities who will ensure order and security."The Mexican army killed Nemesio Rubén Oseguera Cervantes, known as El Mencho, leader of the Jalisco New Generation Cartel, on Sunday. His death sparked several days of violence.Cartel members burned cars and blocked roads across nearly a dozen states, and authorities report at least 70 people have died. Four top local soccer matches were postponed last Sunday, including one in Queretaro, where Mexico beat Iceland 4‑0 in a friendly on Wednesday.A minute of silence was held for soldiers who died in the operation.Mexico will host 13 World Cup matches, including the opening game in Mexico City on June 11 against South Africa. Guadalajara, the cartel’s central hub, will host four matches. Colombia will play one match in Mexico City and one in Guadalajara."Our first two matches are in Mexico, but we know they will overcome this and move forward," said Ramón Jesurún, the president of the Colombian Soccer Federation."I have absolute and total confidence in my geopolitical thinking that this is an issue Mexico will overcome and overcome very quickly."Other countries are more worried. The Portuguese Soccer Federation said on Tuesday that it is closely watching the situation before a friendly match against Mexico in March. Jamaica will play New Caledonia in Guadalajara on March 26 in an intercontinental playoff semifinal, with the winner facing Congo for a spot in the World Cup."The games are at the end of March, so we still have another month to see what happens; but it is making me very nervous, to be honest," said Michael Ricketts, the president of the Jamaican Soccer Federation."We will be listening out for CONCACAF and FIFA to give us instructions (on) whether they are playing the games or whether they are immediately looking for other options."Another Mexican city, Monterrey, will host a playoff where Bolivia plays Suriname and the winner faces Iraq for a spot in the tournament.On Monday, Sheinbaum said there is "every guarantee" that the World Cup matches in Guadalajara will be played as planned and added that there was "no risk.""We are in regular contact with the presidency and the authorities in Mexico and we are monitoring the situation," Infantino said."The World Cup is going to be an incredible celebration."
Article Summary: Violence in Mexico has raised concerns about whether the country can safely co- host the World Cup. FIFA President Gianni Infantino, however, believes it is possible. The Mexican army killed Nemesio Rubén Oseguera Cervantes, known as El Mencho, on Sunday.

Article Title: Vinicius seals Real Madrids' progress, Galatasaray stun Juventus, PSG edge Monaco
Article Text:
Real Madrid's Vinicius Junior celebrates after scoring (AP Photo)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

Vinicius Junior helped Real Madrid reach the Champions League last 16 by scoring the winning goal in a 2‑1 win over Benfica, giving them a 3‑1 aggregate victory. Paris Saint-Germain also advanced after beating 10‑man Monaco.Juventus nearly made a comeback from a 5‑2 first-leg loss to Galatasaray, but extra-time goals from Victor Osimhen and Baris Yilmaz gave the Turkish side a 7‑5 aggregate win. Atalanta went through 4‑3 on aggregate against Borussia Dortmund thanks to Lazar Samardzic’s injury-time penalty."(Vini) had a great game," Real Madrid coach Alvaro Arbeloa told Movistar."Unbalancing them, scoring, creating a lot of danger every time he took them on."A week after the racism incident in Lisbon, Vinicius Junior made a statement on the field as Gianluca Prestianni, the player he accused, missed the match due to a provisional UEFA ban. Benfica’s coach Jose Mourinho was also suspended, but his team briefly gave him hope.Rafa Silva put Benfica ahead in the 14th minute, but Aurelien Tchouameni equalised two minutes later with a finish from Federico Valverde’s pass. With Kylian Mbappe injured, Vinicius stole the show 11 minutes from the end, scoring the winner past goalkeeper Anatoliy Trubin into the far corner.Tchouameni called it "a victory over racism".Osimhen breaks Juventus’ heartsTen-man Juventus almost pulled off a comeback but fell short, losing 3‑2 after extra time to Galatasaray in Turin. Manuel Locatelli gave Juve hope with a first-half penalty. However, Lloyd Kelly was sent off early in the second half, leaving Juve with ten men.Federico Gatti scored from Pierre Kalulu’s cross, and Weston McKennie equalised late to take the game into extra time. But Victor Osimhen and Baris Yilmaz scored in extra time to send the Turks through."It almost makes me want to cry for how much we believed. I think we gave our heart, and more," Locatelli told Prime Video."The lads delivered an incredible performance, but we threw the qualification away in the first leg," added Gatti.PSG survive scare as Monaco fight backPSG overcame a first-half scare to beat Monaco 5-4 on aggregate after a 2-2 draw at the Parc des Princes."What we've shown this season is our resilience, our ability to solve problems," PSG coach Luis Enrique said of his team.With Achraf Hakimi starting despite facing a trial for alleged rape, PSG had a slow start.Monaco equalised on aggregate just before half-time when Maghnes Akliouche scored from a clever pass by Mamadou Coulibaly. Early in the second half, Coulibaly received two quick yellow cards and was sent off. Shortly after, Desire Doue set up Marquinhos, who scored from close range to give PSG the lead again.Six minutes later, Hakimi let fly from distance, Monaco goalkeeper Philipp Koehn parried, and Khvicha Kvaratskhelia slammed home the rebound to all but crush the visitors' hopes before Jordan Teze scored in injury time.Meanwhile, Atalanta beat Borussia Dortmund 4‑1 on the night, with Lazar Samardzic’s last-minute penalty sealing the win after Ramy Bensebaini conceded a foul. Atalanta overturned a 2‑0 first-leg deficit thanks to goals from Gianluca Scamacca, Davide Zappacosta, and Mario Pasalic.
Article Summary: Real Madrid beat Benfica 2-1 to reach Champions League last 16. PSG beat Monaco 5-4 on aggregate after 2-2 draw at Parc des Princes. Juventus lose 3-2 after extra time to Galatasaray. Atalanta beat Borussia Dortmund 4-1 thanks to Lazar Samardzic's penalty.

Article Title: Injured Anju Tamang ruled out of Asian Cup
Article Text:
Anju Tamang

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

PANAJI: India have been dealt a heavy blow with experienced midfielder Anju Tamang ruled out of the AFC Women’s Asian Cup. The attacking midfielder with over 70 appearances for India was the senior most player in the team. But an injury during training early this week has ended her dream of playing in the Asian Cup.Anju had also missed the Asian Cup in 2022 after hosts India were scratched out of the tournament with several players testing Covid-positive. An Indian Women’s League (IWL) champ with East Bengal last season, Anju has now been replaced with Karishma Shirvaikar.India head to Australia looking to punch above their weight and qualify for the FIFA Women’s World Cup for the first time. India have been placed in group C, alongside Vietnam (March 4), Japan (March 7) and Chinese Taipei (March 10).
Article Summary: Anju Tamang has been ruled out of the AFC Women's Asian Cup. The attacking midfielder with over 70 appearances for India was the senior most player in the team. India head to Australia looking to punch above their weight and qualify for the FIFA Women’s World Cup.

Article Title: PSG star Achraf Hakimi set to face trial on rape allegation
Article Text:
PSG's Achraf Hakimi (AP Photo)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

Paris Saint-Germain defender Achraf Hakimi will go on trial in France after being accused of rape, his lawyer and a French prosecutor told AFP on Tuesday.In February 2023, a 24-year-old woman told police in the Val-de-Marne area near Paris that Hakimi raped her. Hakimi, who is now 27, strongly denies the accusation.He wrote on social media that he is calm about the trial and believes it will show that he is innocent."Today, a rape accusation is enough to justify a trial, even though I contest it and everything proves that it is false," he wrote on X on Tuesday."I await this trial calmly, which will allow the truth to come out publicly."Hakimi's lawyer Fanny Colin said a trial had been ordered and the prosecutor in the Nanterre suburb of Paris confirmed it."A trial has been ordered on the basis of an accusation that rests solely on the word of a woman who obstructed all investigations, refused all medical examinations and DNA tests, refused to allow her mobile phone to be examined, and refused to give the name of a key witness," Colin said.According to earlier police information, the woman said she met Hakimi on Instagram in January 2023. She went to his house in a taxi he ordered.She said he kissed and touched her without consent and then raped her. She said she managed to push him away and text a friend, who picked her up.PSG coach Luis Enrique, when asked about it at a Tuesday press conference ahead of the Champions League play-off second leg match with Monaco, said: "This matter is in the hands of the authorities."Hakimi continues to train with the team and is expected to play in their upcoming match against Monaco.The woman’s lawyer, Rachel-Flore Pardo, said her client feels relieved that the case will go to court.She said the judiciary had been exemplary in handling the case.But its treatment in general showed "there are still areas where the #MeToo movement has not yet breached the sound barrier, chiefly in men's football," she added.Hakimi was born in Spain to Moroccan parents. He started his career at Real Madrid and made his senior debut in 2017. He was part of the squad when Real Madrid won the 2017–18 Champions League.He later played for Borussia Dortmund and Inter Milan before joining Paris Saint-Germain in 2021.Hakimi was also one of Morocco’s key players when they reached the semi-finals of the 2022 World Cup, becoming the first African and Arab team to do so.
Article Summary: Paris Saint-Germain defender Achraf Hakimi will go on trial in France after being accused of rape. A 24-year-old woman told police in the Val-de-Marne area near Paris that Hakimi raped her. Hakimi, who is now 27, strongly denies the accusation.

Article Title: Inter knocked out by Bodo/Glimt as Newcastle and Atletico book last-16 spots
Article Text:
Glimt's players celebrate after their win against Inter (AP Photo)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

Norwegian club Bodo/Glimt caused a huge shock in the Champions League on Tuesday. They beat Inter Milan 2-1 at the San Siro and won 5-2 on aggregate to reach the last 16. Other teams that also qualified were Newcastle United, Atletico Madrid, and Bayer Leverkusen.Bodo/Glimt had already won 3-1 at home in the first leg. Inter, last season’s runners-up and currently top of Serie A, were expected to win easily at home. But Bodo/Glimt defended well and finished the job in the second half.Jens Petter Hauge scored first after Inter made a mistake in defense. Hakon Evjen then made it 2-0 on the night, giving Bodo/Glimt a big 5-1 lead overall. Alessandro Bastoni scored once for Inter, but it was not enough.Bodo/Glimt are the first Norwegian team to reach this stage of the Champions League since Rosenborg in 1997. Their success is even more impressive because they are currently in their off-season. The Norwegian league ended in November and does not start again until March."For us it's been unbelievable. We knew it would be very hard against Inter who are a very strong team and played in the final last season," said Hauge.Next, they will play either Sporting Lisbon or Manchester City in the last 16.For Inter, this is a big disappointment. Last season they reached the final but lost 5-0 to Paris Saint-Germain.Newcastle United also went through to the last 16. After winning 6-1 away in the first leg against Qarabag, they won 3-2 at home.Sandro Tonali and Joelinton scored early goals. Qarabag fought back, but Newcastle had done enough over the two matches. They will now face either Chelsea or Barcelona."I think if you look at the score over the two legs it's been fantastic from the players even though today feels like a bit of a hollow win for us," said Howe.Atletico Madrid beat Club Brugge 4-1 at home after drawing 3-3 in the first leg. Norwegian striker Alexander Sorloth scored three goals (a hat-trick).Atletico won 7-4 on aggregate, they will play either Tottenham or Liverpool next."I'm not thinking about Liverpool or Tottenham, I'm enjoying today's game and being in the last 16 for another season is very important," Simeone told broadcaster Movistar.Bayer Leverkusen also qualified. They had won 2-0 away against Olympiacos in the first leg and drew 0-0 at home in the second leg. In the next round, they will face either Arsenal or Bayern Munich.
Article Summary: Norwegian club Bodo/Glimt beat Inter Milan 2-1 at the San Siro. They won 5-2 on aggregate to reach the last 16. Newcastle United, Atletico Madrid, and Bayer Leverkusen also qualified.

Article Title: Sonny Styles: NFL Combine 2026: Who is Sonny Styles? The linebacker turning heads with blazing speed and elite jumps
Article Text:
NFL Combine 2026: Who is Sonny Styles? The linebacker turning heads with blazing speed and elite jumps

Elite speed and a jaw-dropping vertical jump push Sonny Styles into top-tier draft talk

The buzz around Sonny Styles grew louder inside Lucas Oil Stadium in Indianapolis. Linebackers, defensive linemen and edge rushers opened on-field workouts at the NFL Scouting Combine, but by the end of the night, one performance stood above the rest. Styles did not just test well. He changed the conversation.For those tracking Sonny Styles' NFL Combine outing, this was the type of showing that reshapes draft boards overnight. At 6-foot-5 and 244 pounds, the former Ohio State defender already had scouts intrigued. What followed on Thursday backed up every bit of that intrigue with numbers that demand attention.Sonny Styles, the former linebacker from the Ohio State Buckeyes, clocked a 4.46-second 40-yard dash, tying for the fastest among linebackers and edging TCU’s Kaleb Elarms-Orr by 0.01 seconds based on official results released that evening. Texas linebacker Anthony Hill Jr. came next at 4.51. Only 12 of the 28 linebackers chose to run, which made Styles’ decision to compete even more significant. He did not wait for a pro day. He answered questions on the biggest stage.Then came the jumps, and that is where the night turned from impressive to eye-opening. Styles recorded a 43.5-inch vertical jump, the best among LBs and one of the top marks overall at the 2026 Combine.Elarms-Orr and Iowa’s Karson Sharar reached 40 inches, but Styles cleared them comfortably. His broad jump measured 11 feet 2 inches, or 134 inches, topping Pittsburgh’s Kyle Louis, who posted 10 feet 9 inches.Those testing marks tell a clear story. A 4.46 at 244 pounds signals a rare range for an off-ball linebacker. The vertical jump reflects lower-body explosion that shows up when closing gaps or elevating in coverage. The broad jump confirms balance and drive. During the February 26 NFL Network broadcast, analysts highlighted how uncommon it is to see that blend of size, length, and burst in one prospect.Styles built his reputation at Ohio State as a versatile defender who could cover space like a safety while holding up in the box. On Thursday in Indianapolis, he matched that tape with elite measurables. On his college career, he has 245 tackles, 9 sacks and 1 interception.So who is Sonny Styles? After this NFL combine performance, he is no longer just a productive college linebacker. He is a legitimate early first-round discussion, powered by blazing speed and a vertical jump that turned heads across the league.
Article Summary: Sonny Styles recorded a 4.46-second 40-yard dash and a 43.5-inch vertical jump. The former Ohio State linebacker is 6-foot-5 and 244 pounds. His broad jump measured 11 feet 2 inches, or 134 inches, topping Pittsburgh's Kyle Louis.

Article Title: Seahawks coach Mike Macdonald reveals surprising Tom Brady text after stunning Super Bowl win over Patriots
Article Text:
Tom Brady texted Mike Macdonald after Super Bowl LX win (Getty Images)

Seahawks HC Mike Macdonald Talks Super Bowl LX Win & More with Rich Eisen | Full Interview

Mike Macdonald shares Tom Brady’s unexpected message following Seahawks’ Super Bowl victory



"Tom Brady texted me." That is how Mike Macdonald chose to describe one of the more surreal moments that followed the Seattle Seahawks’ 29-13 win over the New England Patriots in Super Bowl 2026. Nearly a month after the confetti fell on Feb. 8, the Seahawks head coach was still sorting through what he called “a couple hundred” congratulatory messages. One stood out.Appearing on The Rich Eisen Show on Feb. 25, Macdonald shared that the note came from Brady, the quarterback who built a dynasty in New England and now watches the league from a different seat. The exchange was brief. It was genuine. And it carried a touch of humor that only football lifers can appreciate.The timing made it meaningful. Seattle had just beaten the Patriots, Brady’s old franchise, to close the 2026 season. Brady, now 48, won six of his seven Super Bowl rings in Foxborough. He is also a minority owner of the Las Vegas Raiders, a detail that added an extra layer to the conversation.“Tom Brady texted me. That was cool,” Macdonald said about the message. When asked what Brady wrote, Rich Eisen guessed it was something along the lines of “Way to go.”Macdonald, 38, smiled through his answer. “Yeah.”Then came the playful jab. “I did tell him, ‘Hey, thanks for stealing our [offensive coordinator],’ ” Macdonald said.That line was not random. Seahawks offensive coordinator Klint Kubiak confirmed on Super Bowl night that he would become head coach of the Raiders for the 2026 season. “You guys know I'm going to Las Vegas,” he said on NFL Network. He admitted he was “fired up” about the opportunity, though his focus that night was finishing the job in Seattle.Brady’s connection to Las Vegas goes back to October 2024, when he became a minority owner of the franchise. His rooting interests have shifted since retirement. Before the Super Bowl, he said on the Let’s Go podcast that he didn’t “have a dog in the fight in this one.”“May the best team win, and in terms of the Patriots, this is a new chapter in New England, and I'm glad everyone's embraced the Mike Vrabel regime,” Brady said. He added, “All the amazing players that have worked so hard to get their club to this position. We did it for 20 years. There was a little bit of a hiatus in there, but the Patriots are back, and it's a very exciting time for everyone in New England.”Brady attended the game and told PEOPLE he looked forward to spending time with former teammates Julian Edelman and Rob Gronkowski, calling them “my brothers.”For Macdonald, the flood of messages marked a milestone in a young coaching career. A title. Respect from peers. And a text from one of the game’s most decorated figures, equal parts congratulations and quiet reminder that in the NFL, today’s rival can be tomorrow’s business partner.
Article Summary: Mike Macdonald says Tom Brady texted him after Seahawks' Super Bowl win. Macdonald was sorting through "a couple hundred" congratulatory messages. The Seahawks beat the New England Patriots 29-13 in Super Bowl 2026. Brady, now 48, is a minority owner of the Las Vegas Raiders.

Article Title: Tez Johnson's ex-fiancee Laila Thompson-Wainer claims he cheated on her the same day he proposed
Article Text:
Tez Johnson’s Fiancee Laila Thompson-Wainer (Tiktok and Getty Images)

Tez Johnson cheating allegations : What Laila Thompson-Wainer says



Tez Johnson is facing public accusations that have quickly moved beyond private heartbreak and into the spotlight. The Tampa Bay Buccaneers wide receiver has been accused by his ex fiancée, Laila Thompson-Wainer, of cheating on her with an ex girlfriend on the very day he proposed. Her account, shared in a TikTok video, has drawn sharp attention not only because of the timing she describes, but because of the painful detail behind it.Johnson proposed last year at a hilltop setting that Thompson-Wainer says felt picture perfect. Music played. Flowers framed the moment. They later took photos on the beach and celebrated with sushi before heading home. For her, it was the start of a future. For him, she now claims, it was something far more complicated.According to Thompson-Wainer, she only later discovered messages that changed how she saw that entire day. “A year ago today, I got engaged, and later learned he cheated on me the same day he proposed,” Thompson-Wainer wrote in the video. “This morning, I woke up not sad about him. There’s no reason I’d ever want to be around someone like that, but I’m more overwhelmed by the grief of when I believed people were inherently good.She described the proposal in vivid detail. “He gets down on one knee, he slides the ring on my finger,” she says. “My cheeks hurt from smiling. I was so happy.” Hours later, she says, the tone of the day looks very different in hindsight.Thompson-Wainer shared screenshots of direct messages she alleges Johnson sent to his ex girlfriend at 1:07 a.m. and again at 9:11 a.m. One message read, “What ever team I visit we can just meet there and when I come down there, I need to see you like idk what else to say I think we have to.” Another was more explicit: “Need your throat.”“Knowing what I know now, this was his timeline for the day,” Thompson-Wainer says. “He wakes up and texts his ex-girlfriend. Then he proposes. Then we get home from our engagement dinner, and then he texts her.”Her confusion still lingers. “You cheat before and after you propose, the morning of and the night,” Thompson-Wainer says. “You know what? That’s something I will never understand.”The couple publicly announced their engagement on March 3, 2025. Less than two months later, on April 26, 2025, Johnson was selected in the seventh round of the NFL Draft by the Buccaneers after a strong final season at Oregon, where he recorded 86 catches for 1,182 yards and 10 touchdowns. The adopted brother of Denver Broncos quarterback Bo Nix entered the league with momentum. Now, the conversation around his name has shifted.For Thompson-Wainer, the goal in speaking out goes beyond revisiting old wounds. “If I can make one woman feel seen, heard, or understood, help in a healing journey, then I’ve done what I set out to do,” Thompson-Wainer says. “If I had to deal with a bad fiancé, I would use what I learned about a bad man to spark conversations about healing and build a community of women," she concluded.
Article Summary: Tampa Bay Buccaneers wide receiver Tez Johnson is accused of cheating on his fiancée. Laila Thompson-Wainer claims he cheated on her with an ex girlfriend on the day he proposed. She shared screenshots of direct messages she alleges Johnson sent to his ex girlfriend.

Article Title: Cardi B and Stefon Diggs’ complicated breakup reveals deeper struggles that fans never saw coming publicly
Article Text:
Cardi B and Stefon Diggs (Getty Images)

Cardi B distances herself from Stefon Diggs as complicated romance fails to survive mounting pressure

Cardi B and Stefon Diggs (Getty Images)

Stefon Diggs and Cardi B have hit another rough stretch, and this time the distance feels more deliberate. What once looked like a fast, fearless romance has slowed under the weight of doubt. “Things were getting too heated and complicated,” a source told People. That tension pushed Cardi to reassess what mattered most. The timing, just days before the Super Bowl 2026, only added to the sense that something significant had shifted behind the scenes.She did not hide her priorities. “Cardi is very no-nonsense. The second she felt that she couldn’t trust him, she pulled back to focus on her kids, her music and tour.” For an artist balancing motherhood, touring, and public scrutiny, stability is not a luxury. It is essential. The relationship, once public and hopeful, suddenly became private and uncertain.The break came quickly, reportedly just days before Diggs and the New England Patriots faced the Seattle Seahawks in February’s championship game. By then, warning signs were already there. Fans noticed social media unfollows.They also spotted Diggs spending time with Pree, a figure tied to Cardi’s past with Offset, the father of her three older children.Privately, the concerns ran deeper. “He betrayed her so many times. Her friends have been trying to show her that he is not right for her and that she deserved better,” a source told Us Weekly, adding that the Grammy winner is now “single and putting herself out there again.” It was not their first split either, which made this latest pause feel less shocking but more final.Their shared son, born in November 2025, remains a bond neither can ignore. “They co-parent and the door is not completely closed,” the source added. “They might reconnect in the future.” For now, though, Cardi’s focus is clear. She is raising four young children and managing a demanding tour schedule that leaves little room for emotional instability.Legal issues added another layer of strain. Diggs pleaded not guilty to felony strangulation charges tied to an alleged dispute with his personal chef. The case is ongoing, and he has said little publicly about either the charges or the breakup.Cardi, however, addressed the situation in her own way during a Los Angeles tour stop. “Let me tell you something, just because I ain’t f–king with my baby daddy doesn’t mean you get to talk about my baby daddy, bitch! This for you, bitch!” The comment was raw and protective, reflecting a complicated mix of anger and loyalty.Their story began less than a year ago, with Valentine’s Day in Miami and a public reveal that summer. It moved fast. Maybe too fast. Now, with trust fractured and lives pulling in different directions, both are left to figure out what comes next, separately but still connected.
Article Summary: Cardi B and Stefon Diggs split just days before the Super Bowl 2026. The Grammy winner is now “single and putting herself out there again,” a source said. Their shared son, born in November 2025, remains a bond neither can ignore.

Taylor Swift stands by Travis Kelce as he experiences a difficult time



Will Travis Kelce’s retirement decision come next month amid his wedding to Taylor Swift?



Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are trying their best to keep their wedding planning details private even as the whole world waits for them to tie the knot.But the last few months have not been that good for the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player and it might just be affecting him.A few days ago, as per Radar Online, a source revealed, "Like any top athlete, Travis is all about winning, so when things aren't going the team's way, he takes it pretty badly…”The source added, "They've both been on a high for so long, so this is uncharted territory for them…”When Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce started falling in love with each other in 2023, they instantly became a fan favorite.The billionaire pop star was busy touring the world for her legendary Eras Tour as Travis Kelce impressed fans with his performance on the field.Taylor Swift even opened up about the first time she was spotted cheering him on as she said, “So we actually had a significant amount of time that no one knew, which I’m grateful for, because we got to get to know each other.”The billionaire pop star added, “By the time I went to that first game, we were a couple. I think some people think that they saw our first date at that game? We would never be psychotic enough to hard launch a first date…”The two turned heads with their romance but just a few months later, the billionaire pop star was dragged into a legal drama between Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni.This also coincided with Travis Kelce’s team, the Kansas City Chiefs, brutally losing against the Philadelphia Eagles in Super Bowl LIX.While Taylor Swift continued to break new records with her new music, Travis Kelce’s performance on the field continued to suffer even in the last age.Now, the Kansas City Chiefs’ tight end is 37 years old and is fresh off a pretty disappointing season.This has led many to believe that he might just be announcing his retirement next month after his current contract with the team ends.However, there are no confirmations to this yet as Travis Kelce remains silent about his future in the league.As of now, it seems Taylor Swift is focused on being there for Travis Kelce.

Article Title: “I wasn’t prepared for this”: Patrick Mahomes’ wife Brittany Mahomes opens up about the dark side of fame and living life in the public eye
Article Text:
Patrick Mahomes’ wife Brittany Mahomes opens up about the dark side of fame and living life in the public eye.(Image via Getty Images)

Brittany Mahomes opens up about the negative aspect of fame she has because of Patrick Mahomes



Patrick Mahomes has constantly praised his wife, Brittany Mahomes, for her love and support



The Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, Patrick Mahomes , has broken many records on the field while his love and commitment towards his wife, Brittany Mahomes, has inspired millions of fans around the world.The two met as teenagers in school and have been inseparable since. Brittany Mahomes stayed by Patrick Mahomes’ side as he was drafted into the league and is still spotted at almost all matches to cheer him on. Amid this, she has opened up about the dark side of the fame they have achieved.In an interview on CBS Mornings, Patrick Mahomes’ wife, Brittany Mahomes, opened up about it and said, “I was not prepared for this…And at such a young age. We were in love and I loved him with all of my heart.”The popular mom of three added, “But, you know, I didn’t expect it to skyrocket this soon, and us kind of just being thrown into the fire like this.”Patrick Mahomes’ wife, Brittany Mahomes, continued, “When I started posting on Instagram me screaming and getting rowdy in the suite… think the first time I did that it got blown up — and it’s like, ‘She’s crazy, this is too much.’”Over the last few years, Brittany Mahomes has constantly been trolled for her actions or her comments.Even at Super Bowl LIX, when she arrived to support her husband and the Kansas City Chiefs, Brittany Mahomes was brutally trolled for her appearance since she was freshly postpartum after giving birth to their third child.Despite the things that have come her way, Patrick Mahomes’ wife, Brittany Mahomes, never shied away from being the loudest cheerleader for the Kansas City Chiefs.The Kansas City Chiefs’ popular quarterback, Patrick Mahomes, has also often been public about the love and support she has given to him ever since he started playing in the league.Despite their public and demanding lives, there have never been any negative rumors about the high profile and both Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes seem deeply in love with each other.For now, the Kansas City Chiefs’ fans await the star player’s return to the field in the next season as Patrick Mahomes remains fully focused on his recovery from the brutal ACL and LCL tear he sustained in the last season.

Article Title: Colts grant Anthony Richardson permission to seek trade amid QB’s uncertain future
Article Text:
Image via IMAGN

Why are the Colts moving on from Anthony Richardson?

Which teams could trade for Anthony Richardson next?

The Indianapolis Colts have taken a major step regarding quarterback Anthony Richardson’s future by granting him permission to seek a trade. The decision comes less than three years after the franchise selected him with the No. 4 overall pick in the 2023 NFL Draft. Once seen as the team’s long-term solution at quarterback, Richardson’s time in Indianapolis now appears uncertain as the organization reshapes its plans at the position.Reports suggest the Colts and Richardson’s camp have been discussing his future for some time. Injuries, inconsistent performances, and competition within the quarterback room have all contributed to the situation. While the team has not completely closed the door on Richardson, allowing him to explore trade options indicates that a move is increasingly possible before the 2026 season begins.Richardson had high hopes when he joined the NFL since he was a fantastic athlete with a lot of promise. But the first 3 years have been tough for him. He had a lot of health problems that made it impossible for him to play all the time and be available.The Colts' decision to start Daniel Jones over Richardson in the 2025 season showed that the franchise had lost faith in Richardson. These changes have made Richardson's job less important and made him easier to get rid of.Despite the struggles, team officials have continued to highlight Richardson’s youth and potential. At just 23 years old, he remains an intriguing player for teams willing to invest time in his development.Still, the Colts appear ready to move forward with a different quarterback plan.Richardson is likely to draw interest from a number of teams, because of his age, athleticism, and strong arm. He is a low-risk, high-reward alternative for teams looking for a young quarterback.The Los Angeles Rams have been mentioned as a possible destination. As veteran Matthew Stafford gets closer to the end of his career, the Rams may see Richardson as a long-term replacement for him under coach Sean McVay. Miami is another team to keep an eye on, especially since the Dolphins are looking at their quarterback situation and younger prospects.The Minnesota Vikings have also been linked to Richardson as they look to strengthen depth behind J.J. McCarthy. A trade would likely come at a modest cost given Richardson’s current value, but the upside could be appealing for teams seeking a reclamation project.For now, Richardson’s future remains open. The next few weeks of the offseason might be very important for his NFL career, whether he stays in Indianapolis or starts a new chapter somewhere else.
Article Summary: The Indianapolis Colts have granted quarterback Anthony Richardson permission to seek a trade. The decision comes less than three years after the franchise selected him with the No. 4 overall pick in the 2023 NFL Draft. Richardson is likely to draw interest from a number of teams, because of his age, athleticism, and strong arm.

Article Title: Are Travis Kelce and Jason Kelce planning to compete in the 2030 Winter Olympics? Double luge twist creates surprising sports buzz
Article Text:
Are Travis Kelce and Jason Kelce planning to compete in the 2030 Winter Olympics? Double luge twist creates surprising sports buzz (Image via Getty)

Travis Kelce pushes double luge idea while Jason Kelce prefers skeleton

Travis Kelce has his eyes on the 2030 Winter Olympics. And this time, he is not talking about football. On a recent episode of their podcast New Heights, Travis Kelce and Jason Kelce surprised fans when they joked about competing in the 2030 Winter Olympics. The brothers wore Team USA hockey jerseys while talking about the 2026 Winter Olympics, which recently wrapped up with strong performances from United States athletes. Norway finished with the most medals, but Team USA created big moments, especially in men’s and women’s hockey.That Olympic energy clearly inspired the Kelce brothers. During the show, Travis Kelce asked Jason Kelce if he would join him in double luge at the 2030 Games. Double luge is a fast sliding sport where two athletes lie on the same sled and race down an icy track, but Jason Kelce had a different idea.Travis Kelce directly asked his older brother if he would train with him for double luge in 2030. In double luge, one athlete lies on top of the other while speeding down the course. It is one of the fastest sports at the Winter Olympics.Jason Kelce did not fully agree with the plan. He said he would rather try skeleton, which is a solo event.In skeleton, one athlete rides face down on a small sled at high speed. Jason Kelce made it clear that closeness was not the issue. He said, “I am not against being that close to another man. I am just not a luger.”The exchange quickly caught attention because Travis Kelce is still playing in the NFL, while Jason Kelce retired after the 2023 season. Once Travis Kelce retires, the brothers would have more time if they ever seriously wanted to train. For now, the Olympic talk remains playful, but fans loved seeing their competitive side show up in a new sport.
Article Summary: Travis Kelce asked his older brother if he would train with him for double luge in 2030. Jason Kelce did not fully agree with the plan and said he would rather try skeleton. The brothers wore Team USA hockey jerseys while talking about the 2026 Winter Olympics.

Article Title: NFL trade candidates: Breaking down the market value of top 5 players
Article Text:
Image via IMAGN

Top 5 NFL trade candidates

Kyler Murray, Arizona Cardinals

Brian Thomas Jr., Jacksonville Jaguars

Jaylen Waddle, Miami Dolphins

Maxx Crosby, Las Vegas Raiders

A.J. Brown, Philadelphia Eagles

The NFL offseason is getting more exciting as the Scouting Combine has started and free agency is getting closer. Trade talks are becoming a big topic of conversation throughout the league as teams look at their rosters and make preparations for the future. Some well-known players might be on the move because of their contracts, their teams' plans to rebuild, or their teams' changing roster objectives.While not every rumor results in a deal, the trade market often shapes how franchises approach the draft and free agency. From star pass rushers to quarterbacks and wide receivers, a handful of names are drawing significant interest. Here is a closer look at five top NFL trade candidates and what their market value could look like.Kyler Murray’s future in Arizona remains uncertain as the Cardinals continue reshaping their roster. The former No. 1 overall pick is still a starting-caliber quarterback, which makes him attractive to teams needing experience under center. However, his contract complicates any potential move. If Arizona is willing to absorb part of the salary, the return could rise to a mid-round pick. Teams such as the Jets, Vikings and Steelers have been linked as possible landing spots.Brian Thomas Jr. is an intriguing trade name because of his upside. After a strong rookie season, his production dipped, raising questions about his role in Jacksonville’s offense. The Jaguars are not actively shopping him, but rival teams are monitoring the situation. Given his age, rookie contract and potential, Thomas could command a first-round pick plus additional draft capital if a team believes he can return to his earlier form.Jaylen Waddle’s situation reflects Miami’s uncertain direction. The Dolphins might think about making adjustments to their squad, and Waddle's contract and value make him a good topic of conversation. The explosive wide receiver is still useful and under team control, so Miami would probably want a big return. A deal that includes a second-round selection and other assets could be enough, especially for clubs that need a dynamic receiving threat.Maxx Crosby is arguably the biggest defensive name on the potential trade market. The Raiders are rebuilding, and elite pass rushers often attract strong offers. Reports suggest a deal could require multiple first-round picks, highlighting Crosby’s value as a three-down impact defender. However, Las Vegas is not eager to move him unless a blockbuster offer arrives.A.J. Brown’s frustration with Philadelphia’s offense has fueled speculation about his future. Despite that, he remains one of the league’s most productive wide receivers and is under a long-term contract. That combination means any trade would require meaningful compensation, likely a second-round pick and additional selections. Contending teams needing a top receiver could emerge as suitors.As the offseason progresses, these situations will continue to evolve. Trade talks often intensify closer to free agency and the draft, meaning the coming weeks could bring clarity or even a major blockbuster.
Article Summary: The NFL offseason is getting more exciting as the Scouting Combine has started and free agency is getting closer. Trade talks are becoming a big topic of conversation throughout the league as teams look at their rosters and make preparations for the future. Some well-known players might be on the move because of their contracts, teams' plans to rebuild, or their teams' changing roster objectives.

Article Title: Paige Bueckers turn heads with multiple London snapshots ahead of WNBA 2026 season
Article Text:
Paige Bueckers. Image via: Justin Casterline/ Getty Images

Paige Bueckers shares stunning Instagram snapshots from London



Coach Spring 2026 | Explore Your Story | Elle Fanning

Paige Bueckers drops new update on WNBA 2026 season



Paige Bueckers (Image via Imagn Images)

Paige Bueckers is using the offseason to expand her spotlight. The Dallas Wings guard recently shared a series of London snapshots from a luxury campaign shoot, drawing attention across social media as uncertainty lingers around the WNBA’s next chapter. On the court, she continues to build momentum. Off it, she is shaping a broader brand presence that stretches beyond basketball.The 24-year-old guard entered the league with pressure and had a stunning season. After averaging 19.2 points, 3.9 rebounds and 5.4 assists during her Rookie of the Year campaign, Bueckers extended the same rhythm into the three-on-three Unrivaled league. Now, with collective bargaining discussions ongoing and a March 10 deadline approaching, her confidence about the 2026 WNBA season has become part of the conversation.Paige Bueckers posted a carousel of images from her Coach campaign in London, part of the brand’s “Explore Your Story” rollout. Alongside the photos, she wrote, “That Coach shoot in London I once talked about.”The post arrived during a strong stretch in Unrivaled play. Competing for Breeze BC, Bueckers is averaging 23.7 points, 6.4 rebounds and 5.8 assists per game. She ranks third in scoring and has helped her team secure a playoff berth.Earlier projections from Bleacher Report placed her on the First Team All Unrivaled, highlighting her steady presence and production.Her rise has unfolded quickly. From a national championship at UConn to the No. 1 overall draft pick and Rookie of the Year honors, Bueckers has stacked milestones within a short window. The London campaign adds another layer to that growth, reflecting her expanding reach in fashion and culture.While images from London gained traction, Bueckers addressed the bigger question surrounding the league’s future. Speaking to Elle, she expressed certainty about the season ahead."Yes, there'll be a season," Bueckers said. "We're going to figure it out. I think everybody wants to capitalize on the momentum right now, so I think we're going to figure it out. We'll have a season."She also discussed her outlook with the Wings under new head coach Jose Fernandez. "I'm just looking forward to continuing to build," Bueckers said of her second season. "We have a foundation, and we have a core, and we have a new coaching staff, so it's going to be really exciting just to see where what it'll be like under their wings and how we can continue to grow and get better as a team."Bueckers is hopeful for the upcoming season amid negotiation talks.
Article Summary: Paige Bueckers is using the offseason to expand her spotlight. The Dallas Wings guard recently shared a series of London snapshots from a luxury campaign shoot. The 24-year-old guard entered the league with pressure and had a stunning season.

Article Title: Anthony Edwards’ $25K fine penalty takes hilarious turn as Adidas delivers unexpected reaction
Article Text:
Anthony Edwards (Image via Getty)

Adidas steals spotlight with a hilarious response after Anthony Edwards’ 25K fine announcement

Why was Anthony Edwards fined?

The NBA announced a hefty fine against the Minnesota Timberwolves star Anthony Edwards . And Adidas had one of the most hilarious responses to the entire issue. Just moments after the penalty was announced, the brand posted a video that featured the young athlete. The ad posted by Adidas featured an accountant putting money in a bag for situations like these.This is not the first time Anthony has been fined by the league. The Timberwolves star was fined for 8 different transgressions during the previous season. His total expenditure on penalties was $420,000. Hence, it is normal for the brand to save up such a huge amount this time in case the need arises. And they did not have to wait for long.The ad started with a machine counting the number of $100 bills. An accountant appeared on the screen and he started putting the money in a bag. Addressing Anthony Edwards, he stated, “Alright, Ant! This season I am setting aside for us $430,000 in case you have any mishaps, disagreements or slips of the tongue. Let’s take it easy this year. You know what I mean.” The accountant pushes the bag towards Edwards.While the initial part of the ad was a direct target at the fines imposed on the athlete, it soon moved on to be a promo for the new Anthony Edwards 2.The Minnesota Timberwolves star responded by highlighting the features of this new edition. Towards the end, Edwards added, “I just know for sure that I am not going to be slowing down anytime soon, man. So you might just double up.” While posting the ad, Adidas wrote, “Good thing we saved for times like this…Believe That. ” The timing of the ad was perfect and focused on the fact of how the brand takes care of the athletes they partner up with.On February 26, the NBA announced a penalty for Anthony Edwards. It followed from the incident on February 24 during the game between the Minnesota Timberwolves and the Portland Trail Blazers. As the second quarter ended, Anthony grabbed the ball and flung it across the court. Two days later, NBA Communications announced the fine imposed on the athlete. It is $25,000. The Timberwolves won that game against the Trail Blazers.

Article Title: Klay Thompson’s girlfriend Megan Thee Stallion creates major personal milestone amid engagement buzz
Article Text:
Klay Thompson and his girlfriend Megan Thee Stallion. Image via: Efren Landaos/ Sipa via AP Images

Klay Thompson’s girlfriend, Megan Thee Stallion, is set to make her Broadway debut



Megan Thee Stallion. Image via: Kevin Winter/Getty Images for Live Nation

Megan Thee Stallion's recent comment sparked engagement buzz



Klay Thompson with Megan Thee Stallion (Image via Klay Thompson/ Instagram)

Klay Thompson’s girlfriend, Megan Thee Stallion , is stepping into a new arena. The Grammy winner will make her Broadway debut in Moulin Rouge! The Musical for a limited eight-week run from March 24 to May 17 at the Al Hirschfeld Theatre. The announcement adds a major milestone to her expanding career in music, film, and television.The casting arrives as the Tony Award-winning production prepares for its final months on Broadway. Producers confirmed that the show will close in July after a seven-year run. Megan will take over the role of Zidler, becoming the first female-identifying performer to play the character in any production worldwide. The moment places her at the center of one of Broadway’s most celebrated musicals during its farewell stretch.Megan Thee Stallion shared her excitement in an official statement. “Stepping onto the Broadway stage and joining the ‘Moulin Rouge! The Musical’ team is an absolute honor,” she said. “I’ve always believed in pushing myself creatively and theater is definitely a new opportunity that I’m excited to embrace. Broadway demands a different level of discipline, preparation and storytelling, but I’m up for the challenge and can’t wait for the Hotties to see a new side of me.Producer Carmen Pavlovic described the casting as historic. “Welcoming Megan Thee Stallion into the ‘Moulin Rouge! The Musical’ community is a thrilling moment for us,” Pavlovic said.“Megan is a true global superstar. She is one of the most influential artists of her generation and her impact on music and culture is undeniable. This historic casting is a major part of our closing celebrations: our farewell gift to Broadway audiences and one of our biggest announcements in the history of Moulin Rouge! The Musical. We want our show to go out with a spectacular bang, and Megan is the force of nature to lead us there. And yes, there will be a hint of music from her own iconic catalogue. It’s an unmissable moment for both Megan’s fans and ours.”The role expands Megan’s résumé, which already includes hosting Saturday Night Live and acting appearances across film and television.While celebrating her Broadway leap, Megan’s recent words fuel fresh engagement chatter linked to her relationship with Thompson.“I've received quite a bit of attention for my appearance as well as my talent,” she wrote in The New York Times. “I choose my own clothing. Let me repeat: I choose what I wear, not because I am trying to appeal to men, but because I am showing pride in my appearance, and a positive body image is central to who I am as a woman and a performer.”She also told GQ, “I want us to be sassier. I want us to demand more, be more outspoken, keep speaking and just keep demanding what you deserve.” Megan further shared that she’s “manifesting” her engagement as well.
Article Summary: Klay Thompson’s girlfriend, Megan Thee Stallion, is set to make her Broadway debut in Moulin Rouge! The Musical for a limited eight-week run from March 24 to May 17. Megan will take over the role of Zidler, becoming the first female- identifying performer to play the character in any production worldwide.

Article Title: GOAT global box office: Stephen and Ayesha Curry’s movie is roaring with promise but has a long way to break even
Article Text:
Ayesha Curry and Stephen Curry at the World Premiere of Columbia Pictures and Sony Pictures Animation’s 'Goat'. Image via: Eric Charbonneau/Sony Pictures via Getty Images

GOAT global box office so far

Check out the GOAT trailer:

GOAT - Official Teaser Trailer (HD)

Is Stephen and Ayesha Curry's GOAT a hit?



Sony Pictures Animation’s latest theatrical bet has delivered a strong early statement. GOAT, produced by Sony Pictures Animation and backed by NBA star Stephen Curry and entrepreneur Ayesha Curry , has crossed the $100 million mark worldwide within weeks of release. The animated sports comedy opened on February 13 and quickly found its footing despite crowded multiplexes and stiff competition.The film entered theaters alongside Wuthering Heights and Crime 101, while holdovers such as Zootopia 2 and Avatar: Fire and Ash continued to command screens. Yet families showed up from the sports comedy. In its second weekend, the film climbed to No. 1 domestically with $17 million and posted a modest 38 percent drop week over week, a sign of healthy audience retention in a post-holiday frame.According to Box Office Mojo, GOAT has earned $104.3 million worldwide. North America accounts for $60.3 million, or 57.8 percent of the total. International markets have contributed $44 million, pushing the film past the three figure milestone and making it the first animated release in the current cycle to do so.The $35.1 million domestic opening marked the biggest debut for an original animated film since Elemental.That launch set the tone. Unlike franchise sequels, original animated titles often struggle without built in brand awareness. Crossing $100 million signals that the film has connected beyond its core basketball hook.Industry analysts note that family films rely on steady exposure. In recent years, gaps in the release calendar hurt momentum for PG titles. Now, with consistent offerings in theaters, young audiences are discovering trailers on the big screen again.The production budget sits between $80 million and $90 million. To approach break-even territory, the global total likely needs to reach at least $200 million. That leaves significant ground to cover.The film’s overseas rollout is still unfolding. Key territories such as Japan and China can boost animated features considerably, especially given the modest reception. Sustained domestic play will also be crucial in the coming weeks.Directed by Tyree Dillihay, the story follows Will Harris, an undersized goat who dreams of dominating a sport called roarball. The voice cast includes Caleb McLaughlin , Gabrielle Union, Aaron Pierre, Nicola Coughlan, David Harbour, Nick Kroll, and Jennifer Hudson, alongside Steph and Ayesha Curry.GOAT is now showing in theaters.
Article Summary: According to Box Office Mojo, GOAT has earned $104.3 million worldwide. To approach break-even territory, the global total likely needs to reach at least $200 million. The film entered theaters alongside Wuthering Heights and Crime 101, while holdovers such as Zootopia 2 and Avatar: Fire and Ash continued to command screens.

Article Title: Anthony Edwards Fined: Why is Anthony Edwards fined? Minnesota Timberwolves star hit with hefty penalty after shocking halftime incident
Article Text:
Anthony Edwards has been fined (Image via NBA)

Anthony Edwards fined $25K after halftime ball toss incident during Timberwolves win over Blazers

Anthony Edwards’ fine adds to growing list of NBA penalties despite dominant All-Star season

The NBA has fined star guard Anthony Edwards as the Minnesota Timberwolves get ready to play the Los Angeles Clippers on February 26. NBA executive vice president James Jones announced on Thursday that Edwards had been fined $25,000 for tossing the ball "with force" into the stands.This season, Edwards received his fourth career all-star selection. He shot 11 of 27 from the floor and completed the game with 34 points, 4 rebounds, 4 assists, and 2 steals. Edwards played for 38 minutes before checking out at the end of the game. The star guard made 5 of his 13 attempts from beyond the arc and shot 11–27 from the field. Along with four rebounds, four assists, and two steals, he scored 34 points.The event happened during Minnesota's Tuesday halftime victory over the Portland Trail Blazers. After the second quarter ended, Edwards grabbed the ball and flung it the whole length of the court, striking a fan near the stanchion. The official notice read:“Minnesota Timberwolves guard Anthony Edwards has been fined $25,000 for throwing the game ball with force into the spectator stands, it was announced today by James Jones, Executive Vice President, Head of Basketball Operations…”It continued:“The incident occurred at halftime of the Timberwolves’ 124-121 victory over the Portland Trail Blazers at Moda Center on Feb. 24…”According to reports, a spectator seated close to a stanchion at the opposite end of the court was struck by Edwards' toss. At the end of the half against the Blazers, he was spotted launching the ball. The Timberwolves were ahead by a slim margin at the moment, 62-59. What influenced Edwards' choice is unknown.Edwards is one of the higher-paid players at his position, despite the fact that a $25,000 fine is substantial. During the 2024–2025 NBA season, the All-Star guard signed a significant rookie extension. He has averaged 29.6 points, 5.3 rebounds, and 3.7 assists while shooting 49.3% from the field and 40.0% from beyond the arc.On February 22, the Timberwolves lost to the Philadelphia 76ers, who were shorthanded, although they recovered. Minnesota was on a three-game winning streak going into that contest.In March 2025, Edwards was fined $35,000 by the NBA for tossing a game ball into the stands and failing to leave the court promptly after being ejected. Edwards secured a $42.1 million paycheck last year. Edwards is earning $45.5 million this year. In 2028–2029, that figure will reach $55.6 million. Edwards' current contract with the Timberwolves will pay him a total of $244.6 million.The four-time All-Star faced discipline from the league throughout his 2024-25 campaign, racking up $430,000 in total fines for the season Since Edwards has been receiving technical fouls lately, a significant amount of the total comes from them. During the triumph, Edwards played 38:20 and scored 34 points. In 49 games so far this season, the 24-year-old is averaging 29.6 points, 5.3 rebounds, 3.7 assists, and 1.4 steals for the 36-23 Timberwolves.
Article Summary: Anthony Edwards fined $25K after halftime ball toss incident during Timberwolves win over Blazers. Four-time All-Star faced discipline from the league throughout his 2024-25 campaign, racking up $430,000 in total fines for the season. In March 2025, Edwards was fined $35,000 by the NBA for tossing a game ball into the stands.

Article Title: Fact check: Did Dwyane Wade have a child with another woman while he was still with Gabrielle Union before they got married?
Article Text:
Did Dwyane Wade have a child with another woman while he was still with Gabrielle Union before they got married?(Image via Getty Images)

Did Dwyane Wade cheat on Gabrielle Union by having a child while they were dating?

Dwyane Wade has admitted his mistake as he felt “terrible” telling the truth to Gabrielle Union



Dwyane Wade and his wife, Gabrielle Union, have inspired a generation of fans with the love and support they have shown towards each other throughout their careers.While they remain deeply in love with each other even after being married for over a decade, their relationship came to a standstill when Dwyane Wade fathered a child with another woman, when they had taken a break before getting married.No, the former Miami Heat legend Dwyane Wade, did not father a child with his long term friend while he was still actively dating the popular actress, Gabrielle Union.In 2013, Dwyane Wade and Gabrielle Union broke up for a short while when he ended up having a child with another woman.At that point, the NBA legend and Gabrielle Union were no longer together and Dwyane Wade has even admitted that he thought their relationship was over for good.But things took a turn when the Being Mary Jane actress came back to his life and things got pretty complicated in their lives.In 2023, the NBA legend Dwyane Wade appeared on Shannon Sharpe’s, Club Shay Shay podcast, where he opened up about the mess.Dwyane Wade said, “I tried to p****yfoot around it, I tried to break up with her…”The former Miami Heat legend added, “‘Hey, things have been bad lately,’ ‘Hey, we’ve been having a little distance in our relationship anyway,’ I tried all of that.She kept showing up.”Dwyane Wade continued, “You’re thinking about it all, it’s all scary…One, the whole situation is scary enough, you're a public figure. But you know that this is going to hurt someone that you’ve been building a relationship with and a life with.”Dwyane Wade’s wife, the popular actress Gabrielle Union, has also shared how difficult the entire experience had been for her and how she struggled to rebuild the trust she had in the NBA legend.Despite the mess in their lives, Dwyane Wade and Gabrielle Union were successful at rekindling their romance and got married just two months after his son was born in 2013.Since then, both Dwyane Wade and Gabrielle Union have kept themselves away from any controversies as they continue to focus on their marital life and their only child, Kaavia Wade.
Article Summary: Dwyane Wade and his wife, Gabrielle Union, have been married for over a decade. In 2013, Dwyane Wade had a child with another woman while they were still dating. The NBA legend has admitted that he felt “terrible’ telling the truth to his wife.
